<size=50>この地には、<br>三つの大国が割拠していた</size>:
In this land,
three great powers held sway
<size=50>鋼の騎士団を擁する「ミレスガルド王国」</size>: <size=50>The 'Kingdom of Milesgard', wielder of the Steel Knights</size>
<size=50>魔術の理を究めんとする「ペルディオン皇国」</size>: <size=50>The 'Perdion Empire', seekers of the ultimate truth of magic</size>
<size=50>富を求め、富を愛する「エルドラーナ共和国」</size>: <size=50>The 'Eldorana Republic', chasers and lovers of wealth</size>
<size=50>三国は互いの譲れぬ正義を掲げ、<br>長く戦乱の時代を刻んでい:
The three nations, each upholding justice none
could relinquish, had long marked the age with war
<size=50>一人の英雄の出現が、束の間の平穏をもたらしたが、</size>: <size=50>The appearance of a lone hero brought a brief period of peace, </size>
<size=50>それも今は昔……</size>: <size=50>But that too is now a tale of the past...</size>
<size=50>英雄は去り<br>大陸は再び戦火の渦に呑み込まれようとしていた:
The hero departed,
and the continent was about to be swallowed by war once more...
<size=50>だが、人類同士が争う時代は、<br>突如として終わりを告げる<:
But the age of mankind warring against itself
came to a sudden end
<size=50>大地に穿たれた、巨大な『大穴』の出現</size>: <size=50>The rise of the enormous 'Abyss', piercing into the earth</size>
<size=50>対岸は、水平線の彼方のように遠く霞み<br>底には、永遠の闇と:
The far side hazy as the distant horizon,
at its depths stand eternal darkness and despair...
<size=50>後に、人々は知る</size>: <size=50>In time, the people would come to know</size>
<size=50>その無垢な探究心が、<br>悲劇の引き金となることを……</s:
That their innocent curiosity
had become the trigger for tragedy...
